title: Classify Sign
description: Define an algebraic data type Sign with three constructors: Negative, Zero, and Positive (all nullary). Write a function that classifies an integer by constructing the appropriate Sign variant using if-then-else, then uses pattern matching to return -1 for Negative, 0 for Zero, and 1 for Positive.
description_neutral: Classify an integer by its sign using an algebraic data type with three variants (Negative, Zero, Positive). Construct the appropriate variant, then use pattern matching to return -1 for negative, 0 for zero, and 1 for positive.
notes: Parameters: classify_sign(n). @Int.0=n. The function must define a Sign enum ADT, construct the right variant via nested if-then-else (no elif in Vera), and match to map each variant to its integer code.
